steps.title: Use the ratio scale factor
steps.content: The ratio $x:y$ is $9:5$. Since $x=162$, compare $162$ to the ratio part $9$: $$162\div 9=18$$ So the actual values are $18$ times the ratio parts.

steps.title: Scale the y-part
steps.content: The $y$-part of the ratio is $5$, so $$y=5\cdot 18=90$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The pair $(x,y)=(162,90)$ keeps the ratio because $$\frac{162}{90}=\frac{9}{5}$$ Enter 90.
